extendedQueries.sql: SELECT users_t.id, users_t.email, users_t.name, users_t.avatar_url AS "avatarUrl", users_t.role, users_t.status, users_t.is_deleted AS "isDeleted", users_t.metadata, users_t.tags, users_t."lastLoginAt", users_t."createdAt", users_t."updatedAt" FROM "public"."users" users_t WHERE users_t.email LIKE $1 ORDER BY users_t.id ASC

drizzleQueries.sql: select "id", "email", "name", "avatar_url", "role", "status", "is_deleted", "metadata", "tags", "lastLoginAt", "createdAt", "updatedAt" from "users" where "users"."email" like $1 order by "users"."id" asc
